Our Services

Everything your pool needs — nothing it doesn't

Every visit is a full-service clean. No add-on fees for the basics, no surprise charges. Just a consistently clean, safe pool for your family.

💧

Weekly Full-Service Cleaning

Chemistry testing and balancing, brushing walls and steps, vacuuming the floor, skimming the surface, and emptying all baskets — every visit.

Most Popular
🧪

Chemical-Only Service

For pools that need chemistry management between full cleans. We test, balance, and treat — keeping your water safe and clear.

🌿

Green Pool Rescue

Florida algae blooms fast. If your pool has turned green, we provide a full shock and treatment — usually crystal clear within 48–72 hours.

⛈️

Storm Cleanup Service

After a Florida storm, debris can take your pool from swim-ready to unusable overnight. We prioritize storm cleanup so you're back in fast.

What's included in every weekly visit
✓Test and balance water chemistry (chlorine, pH, alkalinity, CYA)
✓Brush walls, steps, and waterline tile
✓Vacuum pool floor
✓Skim surface debris
✓Empty pump and skimmer baskets
✓Inspect pump, filter, and equipment
✓Add chemicals as needed — included in price
✓Photo sent to you after every visit
Why Suncoast

The difference you'll actually notice

The Sarasota–Bradenton area has no shortage of pool companies. Here's what makes us different — and why homeowners who switch don't switch back.

01

Residential Only

We don't split our schedule between homes and commercial accounts. Every customer is a homeowner, and every home gets our full attention.

02

Same Technician, Every Week

You'll know who's coming. Your technician learns your pool — its quirks, its chemistry history, what it needs. No guesswork, no strangers at your gate.

03

Photo Confirmation

After every visit we send a photo of your clean pool so you always know the work was done — even when you weren't home.

04

Honest, Flat Pricing

No hidden fees, no surprise chemical upcharges. The price we quote is the price you pay, week after week.

Common Questions

Everything you want to know before booking

Do you service all types of residential pools?

Yes — concrete, fiberglass, and vinyl liner pools. We also service attached spas. We serve homeowners only and do not take on commercial accounts of any kind.

Are chemicals included in the weekly price?

Standard chemicals (chlorine, pH adjusters, alkalinity, stabilizer) are included in your flat weekly rate. Specialty treatments are billed separately at cost — we'll always tell you before adding anything.

What is the No-Green Guarantee?

If algae appears in your pool between our scheduled visits under a weekly plan, we'll return and treat it at no additional charge. No fine print.

How do I know the service was done?

After every visit we send a photo of your clean pool so you can see exactly what was done — even if you weren't home.

Are you licensed and insured?

Yes. Fully licensed and insured in the state of Florida. Happy to share proof of insurance before your first service.

Is there a long-term contract?

No contracts. We earn your business week after week. Want to pause or stop? Just let us know — no penalties, no hassle.

Ready for a pool you don't have to worry about?

Get a free, no-pressure quote for your home. We'll assess your pool, explain exactly what it needs, and give you a flat weekly rate — no surprises, no contracts.
